title: Analytics Roadmap
content_html:
Analytics Roadmap

Analytics is on a retirement path. Tag management moves to Studio, document sharing moves to integrated Docs Viewer, and tag-package sharing is retired without replacement.

suggested order feature status depends on outcome
1 Analytics App Retirement proposed Tag Management In Studio; Share Document Packages retire the Analytics frontend/server and generic Data Sharing subsystem after their real responsibilities have moved or been explicitly retired

Paused Analytics concepts remain available for reference but are not a reason to retain the application. Source-faithful document-package work now belongs under Share Document Packages; future tag assistance belongs under Studio and remains human-mediated.

Current Position

Document sharing has moved to Docs Viewer, tag-package sharing is retired, and the generic data-sharing/ repository subsystem is gone. analytics-app/ now hosts only the retained canonical tag data and tag-management routes. Retirement remains proposed until Tag Management In Studio moves that final owned capability.
